name: tally
description: Read Tally forms, form submissions, and workspaces to analyze responses collected with the form builder

envVars.name: TALLY_API_KEY
envVars.description: Tally API key (created in Tally under Settings > API keys; shown only once)

tools.name: List Forms
tools.description: List forms in the Tally account, optionally filtered by workspace

tools.name: Get Form
tools.description: Retrieve a single form by ID with all its blocks and settings

tools.name: List Submissions
tools.description: List submissions of a form with their responses, filterable by status and date range

filter.description: Filter submissions by status: all, completed, or partial

startDate.description: Only submissions submitted on or after this date (ISO 8601)

endDate.description: Only submissions submitted on or before this date (ISO 8601)

afterId.description: Only submissions that came after this submission ID

tools.name: Get Submission
tools.description: Retrieve a specific form submission with all its responses and the form questions

tools.name: List Form Questions
tools.description: List a form's questions with their IDs, types, and response counts — lighter than parsing the full form blocks for mapping answers

tools.name: List Workspaces
tools.description: List workspaces with their members and pending invites

prompts.title: Recent responses
prompts.prompt: List my Tally forms, pick the most recently updated one, and summarize its latest submissions.

prompts.title: Form overview
prompts.prompt: Give me an overview of my Tally forms with their status and number of submissions.

prompts.title: Completion rate
prompts.prompt: For a given Tally form, compare completed vs partial submissions and report the completion rate.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Tally API setup

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Sign in to Tally (free accounts work — the API is available to all users), go to Settings > API keys, and click 'Create API key'. Copy the key immediately; it is shown only once.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Forms. The key is sent as Authorization: Bearer <key> against https://api.tally.so.

notes: For real-time submission data, Tally recommends webhooks over polling the submissions endpoint.
List endpoints are paginated with page/limit and return hasMore plus total counts.
